fixed: Guarded satellite AsyncStorage reads and writes so cache failures fall back safely.
Sanitized cached satellite points and validated cache expiry timestamps.
Added a user-visible satellite-refresh fallback alert.
Guarded RevenueCat initialization so Horizon Free remains usable if purchase setup fails.
Guarded Sovereign Sigil SHA-256 preview generation and added a visible unavailable state.
Changed Time-Scrub Matrix date display from UTC slicing to local calendar formatting.
Disambiguated Mercury and Mars labels in the Time-Scrub Matrix.
Completed the Sovereign Sigil WidgetKit provider, timeline, and widget configuration scaffold.
Adjusted the watchOS Digital Crown change handler for broader SwiftUI compatibility.
Updated retired pricing and navigation references in the active handoff documentation.
